terms.description: A net-new feature is shipped with passing tests + handoff PASS
A test or test suite reports PASS in the local test runner
A handoff gate returns PASS verdict in sd_phase_handoffs
A sub-agent writes a PASS verdict row in sub_agent_execution_results
All required GitHub Actions checks return SUCCESS conclusion
PR transitions to state=MERGED in GitHub
A database migration is applied via apply-migration.js 3-factor guard
A validation_audit_log or audit_log row is written for the event
A retrospectives row with retro_type=SD_COMPLETION is published with quality_score >=60
An SD transitions to status=completed with LEAD-FINAL-APPROVAL handoff accepted
LEAD scope-lock produces metadata.literal_scope + metadata.lead_decision on the SD
A product_requirements_v2 row exists for the SD with status=approved + activation_test_id populated
An sd_phase_handoffs row exists with status=accepted for the specified phase transition
